name: payload_8x8x6in_36h11_12front_13left_14back_15right
coordinate_frame: Origin at payload center. +X is payload right, +Y is up, +Z is payload front. Tags are centered on the four vertical faces.
notes: Payload size is 8 x 8 x 6 inches = 0.2032 x 0.2032 x 0.1524 m.
Tag IDs from payload POV: 12 front, 13 left, 14 back, 15 right.
When the front faces the camera, camera POV is: 12 front, 15 left, 13 right, 14 hidden/back.
Tag size is 100 mm measured across the outer black square.
